channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - kotaku.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for kotaku.com

item.title: 20 Awesome Games From The Summer Game Fest Day Of The Devs Showcase
item.content:encoded:
Day of the Devs, Double Fine’s non-profit indie game showcase, has returned to Summer Game Fest with a fresh roster of unique upcoming titles. You can watch the whole show immediately below, or keep scrolling to see all 20 games that were featured during the showcase, including several world premieres.

Blood Dungeon

The creators of Nidhogg and Wheel World are back with a new title: Blood Dungeon, a hand-drawn 2D game that is equal parts platformer and autoshooter. In it you’ll be navigating mazelike dungeons while getting chased by hordes of endearingly goofy monsters.

Developer and publisher: Messhof

Release date: 2026

Steam Wishlist

Tenebris Somnia

Tenebris Somnia is a survival horror game that flips between retro pixel graphics and unsettling live-action cutscenes. The project is executive-produced by the creators of Faith: The Unholy Trinity, so it’ll probably give you nightmares—which hopefully won’t become real.

Developer and publisher: Andrés Borghi / New Blood Interactive

Release date: October 16, 2026

Steam Wishlist

Mr. Records

Part rhythm adventure, part vinyl shop management sim, Mr. Records is a cute game about the joys of music, created by a small team of composers.

Developer and publisher: Glee-Cheese Studio / Wired Productions

Release date: TBA

Steam Wishlist

33 Immortals

What did you expect the successor to 2020’s poignant management sin Spiritfarer to be? If you guessed a co-op action roguelite about enduring the wrath of God, I don’t believe you. You can play 33 Immortals solo or with friends, but either way you’ll be part of a whopping 33-player battle against the divine.

Developer and publisher: Thunder Lotus

Release date: June 10, 2026

Steam Wishlist

Dreadmoor

Dreadmoor is a fishing adventure game set in a rotting fantasy world packed with monstrous aquatic creatures. If you want to survive, you’ll have to fashion equipment out of whatever you manage to catch.

Developer and publisher: Dream Dock / Digital Vortex

Release date: 2026

Steam Wishlist

Threads of Time

Threads of Time is a turn-based RPG in which you captain a time-traveling airship through history. You’ll assemble a party of time-bending heroes to fight and explore throughout your journey.

Developer and publisher: Riyo / Balor

Release date: TBA

Steam Wishlist

N Plus Infinity Times Two

A new iteration on the N series (N, N Plus, and N Plus Plus), N Plus Infinity Times Two is a multiplayer platformer with momentum-based movement. It’s one of those party games that’s easy to pick up (there are only three buttons) but difficult to master.

Developer and publisher: Metanet Software

Release date: TBA

Steam Wishlist

Into the Unwell

Into the Unwell is a stylish third-person roguelite about a rubber-hose cat going on a bender.

Developer and publisher: She Was Such A Good Horse / Coffee Stain

Release date: 2027

Steam Wishlist

Bub

A game after my own heart, Bub is a narrative adventure about New York City, making art, and navigating bodily changes. The game is a personal story of hope told through a collage of handcrafted art styles.

Developer and publisher: Paperfrog

Release date: 2027

Steam Wishlist

Lazy River

The creator of Secret Hitler is moving into the digital games space with a romp perfect for summer. Lazy River is a co-op first-person shooter set in a galactic waterpark, where pool noodles, waterguns, and water balloons are your weapons against zombies.

Developer and publisher: Mike Boxleiter

Release date: TBA

Steam Wishlist

Prove You’re Human

From the makers of 1000xResist, Prove You’re Human is a game about an AI who believes she’s human. Your job is to solve CAPTCHAs in a digital world and prove your AI companion wrong.

Developer and publisher: Sunset Visitor / Black Tabby

Release date: TBA

Steam Wishlist

Ithaca

Ithaca is the latest title from the creators of Wednesdays, The Wreck, and Inua – A Story in Ice and Time. It’s a beautiful narrative RPG about an environmental rights lawyer embarking on a road trip—with a big petroleum exec tied up in the trunk of her car.

Developer and publisher: The Pixel Hunt

Release date: TBA

Steam Wishlist

Screenbound

Screenbound is the perfect game for screenagers with ’90s nostalgia: a puzzle platformer in which you split your time between the 3D world around you and the 2D world depicted on the screen of your handheld retro gaming console.

Developer and publisher: Radical Forge, Crescent Moon / Digital Pajamas

Release date: September 10, 2026

Steam Wishlist

Shot One Fighters

Shot One Fighters is a single-player fighting game roguelite. You’ll discover movesets across a wide roster of characters and use artifacts to upgrade (or scrap) your abilities as you fight.

Developer and publisher: Red Moon Workshop

Release date: TBA

Steam Wishlist

Apple Crumble

From the creators of the Duck Detective series comes Apple Crumble, a cozy(?) mystery thriller in which you’re trying to stop your family from murdering your grandmother on her birthday.

Developer and publisher: Happy Broccoli

Release date: 2026

Steam Wishlist

Slap Out of It!

Slap Out of It! is a first-person comedy sandbox in which you use your noodly arms to slap things, solve puzzles, and help (or hurt) the weird customers at your corporate job.

Developer and publisher: Turbo Button

Release date: TBA

Steam Wishlist

Super Yooka-Laylee Kart

Super Yooka-Laylee Kart is a competitive racing game that’s all about using technical skill to beat your opponents—no blue shells here.

Developer and publisher: Playtonic

Release date: TBA

Steam Wishlist

Into the Fire

Into the Fire is an extraction survival game in which you plunge through fires to rescue survivors and plan out escape routes through constantly changing terrain.

Developer and publisher: Starward Industries

Release date: 2026

Steam Wishlist

Trine 6: Together in Time

The sixth installment of the Trine series, Trine 6: Together in Time is a co-op puzzle platformer in which you and your spellcasting friends navigate a magical fantasy world.

Developer and publisher: Frozenbyte / Cooldown

Release date: September 17, 2026

Steam Wishlist

When Sirens Fall Silent

When Sirens Fall Silent is a psychological thriller about an Italian policewoman working on a serial murder case that delves into the supernatural.

Developer and publisher: LKA / Wired Productions

Release date: TBA

Steam Wishlist



https://kotaku.com/day-of-the-devs-summer-game-fest-cool-indie-games-2000703470
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
